Service

Live & Events

Watch art happen. Live painting for galas, festivals, activations, and openings, with a finished piece guests can take home or hang on the wall.

What we do

The entertainment and the keepsake.

Live painting turns a blank canvas into the centerpiece of the room. Over the course of your event, guests watch a full piece come together, from sketch to signature. At the end of the night you walk away with the painting: a literal souvenir of what happened there.

We've painted at nonprofit galas, sports activations, corporate parties, weddings, product launches, and street festivals. We arrive with our own easel, lighting, canvas, and paint, and set up in a spot that gives guests a sightline without blocking the flow of the room.

Galas and fundraisers The finished piece auctions at the end of the night for your cause.
Brand activations Product launches, sponsor tents, grand openings, trade show booths.
Festivals and street events High-traffic, high-energy painting in front of a crowd.
How a live paint runs

Simple for you. Big for your guests.

01

Brief

A quick call to sort the event details: audience, theme, canvas size, sightlines, timing, and the story you want the finished piece to tell.

02

Set up

We arrive two hours early with easel, canvas, task lighting, and paint. A small drop cloth footprint, no mess, ready to go before doors open.

03

Paint

We paint through the event, typically three to five hours. Guests can watch up close, take photos, and see the piece evolve in real time.

04

Reveal

The finished work is signed on the spot and ready for auction, hand-off, or hang-up. Clearcoat the next day if you want extra protection.

Event Booking

Book a live painter
for your next event.

Give us the date, the venue, and the theme. We'll come back with a plan, a canvas size, and a quote that covers the whole night.

Check Our Availability → View Portfolio

Transforming blank walls into vibrant murals. Elevating St. Petersburg's artistic spirit since 1992.
